summary: Iteration 2 regression + new-feature testing PASSED. Backend pytest 36/36 (added 5 new tests for Brancale staff names/photos, lead owners, sopralluoghi tecnico). Frontend Playwright: immersive hero scroll-driven reveal works (headline opacity goes 0 -> visible after ~800-1200px scroll, hero-cta-stima becomes clickable); 7-step configurator -> calcolo animation -> contact gate (gate-nome/email/telefono/citta/privacy/submit) -> 3 output cards (essenziale 38.400€, premium 36.900€, luxury 64.700€) each with poster image; Team section renders 3 Brancale staff (Giuseppe Founder|Geometra, Giovanni Capo Cantiere, Vincenzo Coordinatore) with real photos; Footer shows +39 389 658 4125, info@gbconstruction.it, Via San Giacomo 35 Casalnuovo + Instagram & Facebook links; Dashboard login admin works -> 'BUONGIORNO, GIUSEPPE'; Topbar/sidebar show Giuseppe RITRATTO photo; Impostazioni > Staff tab lists Giuseppe (admin) / Vincenzo (staff) / Giovanni (operations) with photos.
critical_code_review_comments: Staff API returns field 'name' (not 'nome' as initial test guessed) - confirmed canonical. Includes photo URL pointing to customer-assets emergent CDN.
Photos URL-encoded with space character %20 in filename (RITRATTO%20GIUSEPPE.png etc.) - works fine but consider underscores for cleaner URLs.
Step 7 of configurator uses 'VEDI LA MIA STIMA' or 'Salta questo passaggio' link rather than the data-testid='config-next' - both work; using the Salta link is the documented skip path.
Citta select is a custom button (role=combobox) not a native <select>. Works fine via click + role=option.
ImmersiveHero is sticky ~260vh; pointer-events on CTA are correctly enabled only after scroll progress > 0.4 (verified hero-cta-stima becomes clickable after ~1000px scroll).
Lead owners correctly use Vincenzo/Giovanni Brancale names; sopralluoghi tecnico also defaults to Brancale (no orphan placeholders detected).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_brancale_regression.py (new - 5 tests for Brancale staff names/photos, lead owners, sopralluoghi tecnico, projects health)
test_credentials: admin@gbconstruction.it / GBadmin2026!  (admin Giuseppe Brancale) ; staff@gbconstruction.it / GBstaff2026!  (Vincenzo Brancale) ; operations@gbconstruction.it / GBops2026!  (Giovanni Brancale) - all verified working
seed_data_creation: Created TEST Mario UI iter2 lead via UI configurator flow (test_iter2_ui@example.com, Napoli) + 1 TEST callback + TEST_ pytest staff user via API. Backend was re-seeded on startup (re-confirmed 12 leads, 3 cantieri, 86 voci, coefficienti present).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/ (test_gb_backend.py + test_brancale_regression.py) is the canonical regression. Staff field is 'name' not 'nome'. ImmersiveHero requires window.scrollTo(0, ~1000) to reveal headline + enable hero-cta-stima; alternatively scroll to #configuratore. Configurator step 7 has no config-next - use 'Salta questo passaggio' link or 'VEDI LA MIA STIMA' button.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
